svg.title: Tura TUI CI quality checks demo
svg.desc: Animated SVG demo of the Tura terminal user interface, styled from the real TUI glyphs, colors, command panels, thinking line, metadata row, and composer.

g.text: apps/tui src animation and command rendering checks
